response: "the ghost of christmas yet to come is not the answer, but the mystery of the season remains. the true spirit of christmas is found in the love between people, not in the ghosts that haunt the past. the daughter of the village elder is the key to unlocking the secrets of the forest. the daughter of the baker is the one who brings the warmth of home to the cold winter. the daughter of the shepherd is the one who guides the lost and finds the way. the daughter of the priest is the one who brings hope and light to the darkness of the night. the daughter of the child is the one who brings joy and laughter to the hearts of all who know her. the daughter of the tree is the one who brings the gift of life and love to the world."
